mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wiki_segment_embedding (segment_id, entity_id, content_hash, embedding, model_version, dimensions, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{segmentId}, #{entityId}, #{contentHash}, #{embedding}, #{modelVersion}, #{dimensions}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO wiki_segment_embedding (segment_id, entity_id, content_hash, embedding, model_version, dimensions, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{segmentId}, #{entityId}, #{contentHash}, #{embedding}, #{modelVersion}, #{dimensions}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE content_hash = VALUES(content_hash), embedding = VALUES(embedding), model_version = VALUES(model_version), dimensions = VALUES(dimensions), updated_at = NOW()
